name: security-auditor
description: Register machines and run repeatable Codex-assisted security audits over SSH, with deterministic runtime, dependency, and persistence evidence.

interface.shortDescription: Run repeatable SSH security audits with runtime evidence
interface.longDescription: Security Auditor manages a fleet of machine profiles, runs repeatable security audits over SSH using a remote AI agent when available plus deterministic runtime, dependency, outbound-connection, and persistence checks, stores timestamped reports, and compares audit drift across runs.
